name: ClipboardState
summary: Defines enumerated constant values for different behavior that is related to clipboard data.

enum_values.name: KeepData
enum_values.summary: Always keep clipboard data, regardless of size and never prompt the user.

enum_values.name: DeleteData
enum_values.summary: Always delete clipboard data, regardless of size and never prompt the user.

enum_values.name: PromptWhenBig
enum_values.summary: Prompt user when clipboard memory is large.
